metadata.description: A curated collection of Claude Code plugins for enhanced productivity and development workflows

categories.name: Development
categories.description: Tools for building, reviewing, and maintaining software projects

categories.name: Workflow
categories.description: Planning, orchestration, and project-state tools for agentic work

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Connectors and automations for external services and APIs

categories.name: Productivity
categories.description: Personal workflow tools for notes, handoffs, and retrospectives

categories.name: Safety
categories.description: Guardrails and sanitizers that reduce tool and content risk

categories.name: Utilities
categories.description: General-purpose helper tools and operating-model references

plugins.name: cli-to-plugin
plugins.description: Convert CLI tools into Claude Code plugins by generating skills from command help output.

plugins.name: excalidraw-diagram
plugins.description: Generate and edit Excalidraw diagrams from natural-language prompts and code context.

plugins.name: fakoli-crew
plugins.description: Coordinate specialist software-engineering agents with TDD, debugging, and verification practices.

plugins.name: fakoli-flow
plugins.description: Orchestrate brainstorm, planning, and execution workflows through coordinated agents and critic gates.

plugins.name: fakoli-plugin-critic
plugins.description: Audit Claude Code plugin agents, skills, hooks, MCP servers, and structure with specialist critics.

plugins.name: fakoli-speak
plugins.description: Stream Claude Code text-to-speech through multiple providers with cost tracking.

plugins.name: fakoli-state
plugins.description: Turn PRDs into lockable, evidence-backed work packets for humans and coding agents.

plugins.name: fakoli-style
plugins.description: Track Fakoli operating-model principles in a governed ledger with generated reports.

plugins.name: gws
plugins.description: Operate Google Workspace services through skills, commands, agents, and automation recipes.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Store durable cross-session project handoff notes shared across same-remote checkouts.

plugins.name: marketplace-manager
plugins.description: Manage marketplace plugins, validate manifests, and regenerate registry indices.

plugins.name: nano-banana-pro
plugins.description: Generate, edit, remix, and optimize images with Google Gemini image models.

plugins.name: notebooklm-enhanced
plugins.description: Automate Google NotebookLM notebook creation, source ingestion, and generated study artifacts.

plugins.name: quick-notes
plugins.description: Capture, search, edit, and export dictation-friendly personal notes.

plugins.name: safe-fetch
plugins.description: Sanitize fetched web content before it reaches Claude Code.

plugins.name: session-retro
plugins.description: Analyze local Claude Code and Codex session logs into actionable retrospectives.

plugins.name: ship-task
plugins.description: The mechanical tail of a one-PR-per-task loop as a single command: after review passes, push the branch, open a PR, wait for CI, squash-merge and delete the branch, sync the base, and optionally run a post-merge command (e.g. `anvil apply`). Keeps the repetitive git/gh/CI/merge dance out of the context window; makes no review decisions and stops if CI fails.

plugins.name: systems-thinking
plugins.description: Analyze infrastructure decisions for hidden costs, dependencies, caveats, and risks.
